docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY CALDERON, EVA AS TO DEFENDANT KAPLAN, ADELA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-21-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
